allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('c:/dev/domain-map/.tmp_deploy/AIOPS-build.json'\); console.log\('VALID JSON'\); console.log\('capabilities:', d.capabilities.length\); console.log\('modules:', d.modules.map\(m=>m.domain_module_code\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('lifecycle masters:', d.lifecycle_states.map\(s=>s.data_object_name\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('tools total:', d.tools.length, '| new mutate:', d.tools.filter\(t=>t.existing===false\).length\); console.log\('module_tools:', d.module_tools.length\); console.log\('personas:', d.personas.length\); console.log\('decisions:', d.decisions.map\(x=>x.id+\(x.gating?'\(GATING\)':''\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('new_data_objects:', d.new_data_objects.length, '| vendors_new:', d.vendors_new.length, '| solutions_new:', d.solutions_new.length\);")
